advertiser_ids.label: TikTok Advertiser IDs
advertiser_ids.description: The Advertiser IDs where audiences should be synced. Hidden in production and should not be altered by users.

advertiserId.label: Advertiser ID
advertiserId.description: The advertiser ID to use when syncing audiences. Required if you wish to create or update an audience.

syncAudience.title: Sync Audience [Beta]
syncAudience.description: Sync an Engage Audience to a TikTok Audience Segment. This action is currently in beta.

event_name.label: Event Name
event_name.description: The name of the current Segment event.

send_email.label: Send Email?
send_email.description: Send email to TikTok. Segment will hash this value before sending

send_phone.label: Send Phone Number?
send_phone.description: Send phone number to TikTok. Segment will hash this value before sending

send_advertising_id.label: Send Mobile Advertising ID?
send_advertising_id.description: Send mobile advertising ID (IDFA, AAID or GAID) to TikTok. Segment will hash this value before sending.

email.label: User Email
email.description: The user's email address to send to TikTok.

phone.label: User Phone Number
phone.description: The user's phone number to send to TikTok.

advertising_id.label: User Advertising ID
advertising_id.description: The user's mobile advertising ID to send to TikTok. This could be a GAID, IDFA, or AAID

enable_batching.label: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Enable batching of requests to the TikTok Audiences.

external_audience_id.label: External Audience ID
external_audience_id.description: The Audience ID in TikTok's DB.

batch_keys.label: Batch Keys
batch_keys.description: The keys to use for batching the events.

addToAudience.title: Add to Audience
addToAudience.description: Add records from an Engage Audience to a TikTok Audience Segment.

createAudience.title: Create Audience (Legacy)
createAudience.description: Use this action to create a new audience in TikTok Audience Segment. This is required for legacy instances of the TikTok Audience destination to create a partner audience within TikTok for syncing Engage audiences to.

selected_advertiser_id.label: Advertiser ID
selected_advertiser_id.description: The advertiser ID to use when syncing audiences.

custom_audience_name.label: Custom Audience Name
custom_audience_name.description: Custom audience name of audience to be created. Please note that names over 70 characters will be truncated to 67 characters with "..." appended.
